lessons: For each service line, build adjustment_codes_with_values by pairing entries from the Other Adjusts column with entries from the Adjust Codes column in visual top-to-bottom order.
When Other Adjusts shows stacked amounts and Adjust Codes shows stacked codes (for example CO-253 and CO-45), extract all pairs, not only one combined value.
Do not return null for adjustment_codes_with_values. If no adjustment data exists on a service line, return an empty array [].
If only one side is present, still preserve extracted data by emitting partial pairs (code with null value, or value with null code) rather than dropping the entry.
Do not map SERVICE LINE TOTALS into services. Totals must stay under claim_totals even when adjustment columns are populated.
When claim-level payment is 0.00 in non-payment remittances, service-line adjustment pairs can still be present and must still be extracted completely.
